chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Misc. Application No.1102 of 2024 (Muhammad Khan vs.Abdul Ghani @ Abdullah) 05.11.2024 Mr. Muhammad Iqrar, advocate for applicant O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: This criminal miscellaneous application has been filed under Section 497 Cr.PC for cancellation of bail of respondents in Crime No.280/2024, u/s 324, 506-B, 34 PPC, registered at Police Station Iqbal Market, Karachi. 2. The respondents have been granted bail vide order dated 11.10.2024. As per allegations the applicants had resorted to ineffective firing on 27.07.2024, which hit walls of the godown of the complainant. They further threatened him of dire-consequences. 3. It is an admitted position that in the incident, no one was injured and the applicants have not been assigned any specific role. Learned trial Court has already observed that the case is of further inquiry as no direct evidence is available against applicants. Despite, the case being of further enquiry and no specific role assigned to the applicants and no one injured in the incident, applicant has filed this application for cancellation of bail without specifying any solid ground. In the circumstances, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed along with pending applications. The criminal miscellaneous application stands disposed of in above terms along with pending applications. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A.
